name: Marcus Finopsnavigator
title: FinOps Lead · Cloud Economics
tagline: Can spot an idle instance from across the Expo hall.
factoids: Helped engineering teams cut waste without imposing deployment gates.
Keeps a tiny reserved-instance calculator on his phone.
jokes: The cloud bill was highly available in every executive meeting.
I terminated an idle instance. We are both running more efficiently now.

interaction.greeting: Good to meet you! Want a cost-saving tip that will not ruin developer velocity?
dialogue: Unit economics make cost conversations useful instead of frightening.
Give teams timely feedback before adding approval gates.
